---
title: "Flat_code3"
format: html
---

# Packages

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(dsims)
library(Distance)
library(dssd)
library(dsm)
library(sf)
library(mgcv)
library(knitr)
```

# Constants

```{r}
# Simulation constants
lower_x_bound <- 0
upper_x_bound <- 10000
lower_y_bound <- 0
upper_y_bound <- 10000
units <- "m"

true_N <- 1000
density_grid_spacing <- 100
scale_parameter <- 25
trunc_dist <- 100
design_angle <- 0
design_spacing <- 1000
points_or_lines <- "point" 
bootstrap_reps <- 50

# Set up hotspots
my_hotspots <- list(
  list(centre = c(2000, 8000), sigma = 800, amplitude = 1.2),
  list(centre = c(5000, 2000), sigma = 6000, amplitude = 0.5),
  list(centre = c(8000, 9000), sigma = 1000, amplitude = 2)
)
```

# Create region

```{r}
# Create basic sf boundary box
region_sf <- sf::st_bbox(c(xmin = lower_x_bound, xmax = upper_x_bound, 
                           ymin = lower_y_bound, ymax = upper_y_bound)) |> 
  sf::st_as_sfc() |> 
  sf::st_as_sf()

# Convert to dssd region object
region <- make.region(region.name = "region",
                      shape = region_sf,
                      units = units)
```

# Create density

```{r}
# Create basic uniform density
density_true <- dsims::make.density(region = region,
                                    x.space = density_grid_spacing,
                                    constant = 1)

# Iteratively add hotspots
for (hotspot in my_hotspots) {
  density_true <- dsims::add.hotspot(object = density_true,
                                     centre = hotspot$centre,
                                     sigma = hotspot$sigma,
                                     amplitude = hotspot$amplitude)
}

# Format the true density surface (normalize to N)
density_surface_true <- density_true@density.surface[[1]] |>
  mutate(
    area = as.numeric(sf::st_area(geometry)),
    density = density * true_N / sum(density * area)
  ) |>
  select(strata, density, x, y, geometry)

# Re-create formal density object
density_true <- make.density(
  region = region,
  x.space = density_grid_spacing,
  density.surface = density_surface_true
)
```

## Plot density

```{r}
# Visualizing the underlying generated density map 
ggplot(density_surface_true) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = density), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "True Spatial Density Surface",
       fill = "Density (Animals/Cell)")
```

# Simulate Population

```{r}
# Build population description
pop.desc_true <- make.population.description(
  region = region,
  density = density_true,
  N = true_N,
  fixed.N = TRUE
)

# Build detection characteristics
detect_true <- make.detectability(
  key.function = "hn",
  scale.param = scale_parameter,
  truncation = trunc_dist
)

# Generate final actualized population coordinates
pop_true <- generate.population(
  object = pop.desc_true,
  detectability = detect_true,
  region = region
)

plot(pop_true, region)
```

# Survey data

```{r}
# Build design layout
design <- make.design(
  region        = region,
  transect.type = points_or_lines, 
  design        = "systematic",
  spacing       = design_spacing,
  edge.protocol = "minus",
  design.angle  = design_angle,
  truncation    = trunc_dist
)

# Map the theoretical lines/points over the region
transects <- generate.transects(design)

# Create formal survey object based on transect type
if (points_or_lines == "line") {
  survey <- new(
    Class = "Survey.LT", 
    population = pop_true,
    transect = transects,
    perp.truncation = trunc_dist
  )
} else {
  survey <- new(
    Class = "Survey.PT", 
    population = pop_true,
    transect = transects,
    rad.truncation = trunc_dist 
  )
}

# Execute the survey to get sightings
observed_survey <- run.survey(survey, region = region)
dist_data <- observed_survey@dist.data

plot(survey)
```

# Data wrangling

```{r}
obsdata <- dist_data |> 
  filter(!is.na(distance)) |> 
  mutate(object = as.character(object),
         Sample.Label = as.character(Sample.Label),
         size = 1) |> 
  select(object, Sample.Label, size, distance)

samplers <- transects@samplers

if (points_or_lines == "line") {
  segment_length <- trunc_dist 
  segdata_list <- list()
  new_labels <- character(nrow(obsdata))
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(samplers))) {
    geom <- samplers$geometry[i]
    tr_label <- as.character(samplers$transect[i])
    
    L <- as.numeric(sf::st_length(geom))
    num_segs <- max(1, round(L / segment_length))
    eff <- L / num_segs
    
    fractions <- (seq_len(num_segs) - 0.5) / num_segs
    cents <- sf::st_line_sample(geom, sample = fractions)
    cents_xy <- sf::st_coordinates(cents)
    
    temp_seg <- data.frame(
      Sample.Label = paste0(tr_label, "_", seq_len(num_segs)),
      Effort = eff,
      x = cents_xy[, "X"],
      y = cents_xy[, "Y"],
      orig_transect = tr_label,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    segdata_list[[i]] <- temp_seg
    
    obs_idx <- which(as.character(obsdata$Sample.Label) == tr_label)
    if (length(obs_idx) > 0) {
      for (j in obs_idx) {
        dists <- sqrt((temp_seg$x - obsdata$x[j])^2 + (temp_seg$y - obsdata$y[j])^2)
        new_labels[j] <- temp_seg$Sample.Label[which.min(dists)]
      }
    }
  }
  
  segdata <- bind_rows(segdata_list) |>
    arrange(x, y)
  
  obsdata$Sample.Label <- new_labels
  
} else {
  sampler_xy <- sf::st_coordinates(samplers)
  effort <- 1 # Base effort for point transects
  
  segdata <- data.frame(
    x = sampler_xy[, 1],
    y = sampler_xy[, 2],
    Effort = effort,
    Sample.Label = as.character(samplers$transect) 
  )
}

if (points_or_lines == "line") {
  segdata <- segdata |> 
    mutate(orig_transect = as.numeric(Sample.Label))
}
```

# ds model

```{r}
# Fit basic detection function model
m1 <- ds(
  data = dist_data,
  transect = points_or_lines,
  key = "hn",
  adjustment = NULL,
  truncation = trunc_dist,
  quiet = TRUE
)

# Extract N_hat, SE, and the scale parameter
N_hat <- as.numeric(m1$dht$individuals$N$Estimate)
N_hat <- if (length(N_hat) > 0) as.integer(round(N_hat)) else NA

sigma_hat <- as.numeric(exp(coef(m1$ddf)$scale["(Intercept)", "estimate"]))

# Extract cv_Pa_sq safely for Delta Method calculations later
cv_p_val <- m1$dht$individuals$summary$cv.p[1]
if (!is.null(cv_p_val) && length(cv_p_val) > 0) {
  cv_Pa_sq <- (as.numeric(cv_p_val))^2
} else {
  ddf_sum <- summary(m1$ddf)
  cv_Pa_sq <- (ddf_sum$average.p.se / ddf_sum$average.p)^2
}

Region_Area <- as.numeric(sf::st_area(region@region))
D_hat <- N_hat / Region_Area

plot(m1)
```

# Fit dsm and density surface

```{r}
if (nrow(obsdata) > 0) {
  
  if (points_or_lines == "line") {
    dsm1 <- dsm(count ~ s(x), 
                ddf.obj = m1, 
                segment.data = segdata,
                observation.data = obsdata, 
                family = quasipoisson(link = "log"),
                method = "REML", 
                convert.units = 1)
  } else {
    dsm1 <- dsm(count ~ s(x, y), 
                ddf.obj = m1, 
                segment.data = segdata,
                observation.data = obsdata, 
                family = quasipoisson(link = "log"),
                method = "REML", 
                convert.units = 1)
  }
  
  # Create prediction grid
  prediction_grid <- make.density(region = region, 
                                  x.space = density_grid_spacing, 
                                  y.space = density_grid_spacing, 
                                  constant = 1)
  
  pred_grid <- prediction_grid@density.surface[[1]] |> 
    mutate(area = as.numeric(sf::st_area(geometry)))
  
  pred_data <- sf::st_drop_geometry(pred_grid)
  
  predictions <- predict(dsm1, 
                         newdata = pred_data, 
                         off.set = pred_grid$area, 
                         type = "response")
  
  pred_grid <- pred_grid |> 
    mutate(
      N_hat_pred = as.numeric(predictions),
      N_hat_pred = replace_na(N_hat_pred, 0),
      density = if_else(area > 0, N_hat_pred / area, 0), 
      density = pmax(density, .Machine$double.eps),
      density = if_else(is.na(density) | is.nan(density), .Machine$double.eps, density) 
    )
  
  est.density <- make.density(
    region = region, 
    x.space = density_grid_spacing, 
    y.space = density_grid_spacing, 
    density.surface = pred_grid
  )
  
  pop.desc <- make.population.description(
    region = region, 
    density = est.density, 
    N = N_hat,          
    fixed.N = TRUE
  )
  
  # Collapse surface back into 1D if handling lines (for variance tracking)
  if (points_or_lines == "line") {
    dsm_surface <- pred_grid |> 
      group_by(strata, x) |> 
      summarize(
        N_hat_pred = sum(N_hat_pred, na.rm = TRUE),
        area = sum(area, na.rm = TRUE),
        geometry = sf::st_union(geometry),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) |>
      mutate(
        density = if_else(area > 0, N_hat_pred / area, 0),
        density = pmax(density, .Machine$double.eps),
        density = if_else(is.na(density) | is.nan(density), .Machine$double.eps, density),
        y = 0
      ) |> 
      select(strata, density, x, y, N_hat_pred, area, geometry)
  } else {
    dsm_surface <- pred_grid |> 
      select(strata, density, x, y, N_hat_pred, area, geometry)
  }
}
```

## Predicted density plot

```{r}
# Visualize the fitted Density Surface Model predictions

ggplot(pred_grid) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = density * 1e6), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "DSM Predicted Density Surface",
       subtitle = paste0("Total Estimated N_hat: ", round(sum(pred_grid$N_hat_pred))),
       fill = "Density\n(Animals/km²)")
```

# Analytical Variances

```{r}
analytical_variances <- NULL
spatial_variances <- NULL

if (nrow(obsdata) > 0) {
  
  # Delta Method Helper
  apply_delta <- function(var_ER, erhat) {
    cv_ER_sq <- var_ER / (erhat^2)
    var_N <- (N_hat^2) * (cv_ER_sq + cv_Pa_sq)
    var_D <- (D_hat^2) * (cv_ER_sq + cv_Pa_sq)
    list(
      var_N = var_N, 
      var_D = var_D,
      se_N = sqrt(max(0, var_N)), 
      se_D = sqrt(max(0, var_D))
    )
  }
  
  # Calculate observed counts, effort data
  obs_counts <- obsdata |> 
    group_by(Sample.Label) |> 
    summarize(count = sum(size), .groups = "drop")
  
  if (points_or_lines == "line") {
    effort_data <- segdata |> 
      left_join(obs_counts, by = "Sample.Label") |> 
      mutate(count = replace_na(count, 0)) |> 
      group_by(orig_transect) |> 
      summarize(
        count = sum(count),
        Effort = sum(Effort),
        x = mean(x), 
        .groups = "drop") |> 
      arrange(x) 
  } else {
    effort_data <- segdata |> 
      left_join(obs_counts, by = "Sample.Label") |> 
      mutate(count = replace_na(count, 0))
  }
  
  nspotted <- effort_data$count
  lvec <- effort_data$Effort
  L <- sum(lvec)
  k <- length(lvec) 
  ntot <- sum(nspotted)
  
  erhat_obs <- ntot / L
  
  # ----------------------------------------------------
  # Process Variance based on Transect Type
  # ----------------------------------------------------
  if (points_or_lines == "line") {
    ## Empirical Estimators (R2, R3, S1, S2, O1, O2) 
    var.R2 <- (k * sum(lvec^2 * (nspotted/lvec - ntot/L)^2)) / (L^2 * (k - 1))
    var.R3 <- 1 / (L * (k - 1)) * sum(lvec * (nspotted/lvec - ntot/L)^2)
    
    ## Stratified (S1, S2)
    H_strat <- floor(k/2)
    k.h <- rep(2, H_strat)
    if(k %% 2 > 0) k.h[H_strat] <- 3
    end.strat <- cumsum(k.h)
    begin.strat <- cumsum(k.h) - k.h + 1
    
    sum.S1 <- 0; sum.S2 <- 0
    for(h in 1:H_strat) {
      n.strat <- nspotted[begin.strat[h]:end.strat[h]]
      l.strat <- lvec[begin.strat[h]:end.strat[h]]
      nbar.strat <- mean(n.strat)
      lbar.strat <- mean(l.strat)
      
      inner.S1 <- sum((n.strat - nbar.strat - (ntot/L) * (l.strat - lbar.strat))^2)
      sum.S1 <- sum.S1 + k.h[h] / (k.h[h] - 1) * inner.S1
      
      L.strat <- sum(l.strat)
      var.strat.S2 <- k.h[h] / (L.strat^2 * (k.h[h] - 1)) * sum(l.strat^2 * (n.strat/l.strat - nbar.strat/lbar.strat)^2)
      sum.S2 <- sum.S2 + L.strat^2 * var.strat.S2
    }
    var.S1 <- sum.S1 / L^2
    var.S2 <- sum.S2 / L^2
    
    ## Overlapping (O1, O2)
    lvec.1 <- lvec[-k]; lvec.2 <- lvec[-1]
    nvec.1 <- nspotted[-k]; nvec.2 <- nspotted[-1]
    ervec.1 <- nvec.1/lvec.1; ervec.2 <- nvec.2/lvec.2
    
    var.O1 <- k / (2 * L^2 * (k - 1)) * sum((nvec.1 - nvec.2 - ntot/L * (lvec.1 - lvec.2))^2)
    var.O2 <- (2 * k) / (L^2 * (k - 1)) * sum(((lvec.1 * lvec.2)/(lvec.1 + lvec.2))^2 * (ervec.1 - ervec.2)^2)
    
    # Bundle all line estimators into analytical_variances list
    delta_R2 <- apply_delta(var.R2, erhat_obs)
    delta_R3 <- apply_delta(var.R3, erhat_obs)
    delta_S1 <- apply_delta(var.S1, erhat_obs)
    delta_S2 <- apply_delta(var.S2, erhat_obs)
    delta_O1 <- apply_delta(var.O1, erhat_obs)
    delta_O2 <- apply_delta(var.O2, erhat_obs)
    
    analytical_variances <- list(
      var_ER_R2 = var.R2, se_N_R2 = delta_R2$se_N,
      var_ER_R3 = var.R3, se_N_R3 = delta_R3$se_N,
      var_ER_S1 = var.S1, se_N_S1 = delta_S1$se_N,
      var_ER_S2 = var.S2, se_N_S2 = delta_S2$se_N,
      var_ER_O1 = var.O1, se_N_O1 = delta_O1$se_N,
      var_ER_O2 = var.O2, se_N_O2 = delta_O2$se_N
    )
    
    # ----------------------------------------------------
    # Striplet Method (Continuous Line Integrals)
    # ----------------------------------------------------
    if (exists("dsm_surface")) {
      muvec <- dsm_surface$N_hat_pred 
      midvec <- dsm_surface$x
      
      # Normalize abundance to N_hat value
      musum_raw <- sum(muvec, na.rm = TRUE)
      if(musum_raw > 0) {
        muvec <- muvec * (N_hat / musum_raw)
      }
      musum <- sum(muvec, na.rm = TRUE) 
      
      bbox <- sf::st_bbox(region@region)
      y_length <- as.numeric(bbox["ymax"] - bbox["ymin"])
      x_min <- as.numeric(bbox["xmin"])
      x_max <- as.numeric(bbox["xmax"])
      
      cell_width <- min(diff(sort(unique(midvec))))
      if (is.na(cell_width) || cell_width <= 0) cell_width <- 1
      
      B <- 50 
      bvec <- seq(0, design_spacing, length.out = B)
      Lbvec <- rep(0, B)
      Abvec <- rep(0, B)
      
      for (b_idx in 1:B) {
        b_val <- bvec[b_idx]
        lines_grid <- seq(x_min + b_val, x_max, by = design_spacing)
        
        line_strings <- lapply(lines_grid, function(x) {
          sf::st_linestring(matrix(c(x, bbox["ymin"], x, bbox["ymax"]), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE))
        })
        lines_sf <- sf::st_sfc(line_strings, crs = sf::st_crs(region@region))
        clipped_lines <- suppressWarnings(sf::st_intersection(lines_sf, region@region))
        
        Lbvec[b_idx] <- as.numeric(sum(sf::st_length(clipped_lines)))
        min_dist <- sapply(midvec, function(m) min(abs(m - lines_grid)))
        
        # Define the cell's boundaries relative to the transect line
        lower_bound <- min_dist - (cell_width / 2)
        upper_bound <- min_dist + (cell_width / 2)
        
        # Clamp bounds
        lower_bound_clamped <- pmax(lower_bound, -trunc_dist)
        upper_bound_clamped <- pmin(upper_bound, trunc_dist)
        
        integral_val <- sqrt(2 * pi) * sigma_hat * pmax(0, 
            pnorm(upper_bound_clamped, mean = 0, sd = sigma_hat) - 
            pnorm(lower_bound_clamped, mean = 0, sd = sigma_hat)
        )
        
        g_b <- integral_val / cell_width
        Abvec[b_idx] <- sum(muvec * g_b, na.rm = TRUE)
      }
      
      var_ER_striplet <- mean((Abvec + (Abvec^2) * (1 - 1/musum)) / (Lbvec^2), na.rm = TRUE) - 
        (mean(Abvec / Lbvec, na.rm = TRUE))^2
      
      erhat_striplet <- mean(Abvec / Lbvec, na.rm = TRUE)
      delta_striplet <- apply_delta(var_ER_striplet, erhat_striplet)
      
      analytical_variances$var_ER_striplet <- var_ER_striplet
      analytical_variances$se_N_striplet <- delta_striplet$se_N
    }
    
  } else {
    # Boxlet variance estimator
    
    grid_cells <- 50 # Target number of boxlets along the longest axis
    ##### maybe better to just use the existing density grid?
    
    # tessellate the region to create boxlets
    region_sf <- region@region
    region_bbox <- sf::st_bbox(region_sf)
    
    # Calculate the geographic span of both axes and find longer axis
    x_range <- as.numeric(region_bbox["xmax"] - region_bbox["xmin"])
    y_range <- as.numeric(region_bbox["ymax"] - region_bbox["ymin"])
    max_range <- max(x_range, y_range)
    
    # Calculate the single square dimension required to fit exactly 50 boxlets
    square_dim <- max_range / grid_cells
    
    # Calculate width and height required to get that number of boxlets per side
    dx <- as.numeric(region_bbox["xmax"] - region_bbox["xmin"]) / grid_cells
    dy <- as.numeric(region_bbox["ymax"] - region_bbox["ymin"]) / grid_cells
    
    boxlets <- sf::st_make_grid(region_sf, 
                                cellsize = c(square_dim, square_dim), 
                                square = TRUE)
    
    # Build the sf object and optionally filter out boxlets 
    # that fall completely outside an irregular region boundary
    boxlets_sf <- sf::st_sf(geometry = boxlets) |> 
      dplyr::mutate(
        box_id = dplyr::row_number()
      )
    
    # Keep only the boxlets whose centroids fall inside the actual survey region
    boxlet_cents <- sf::st_centroid(boxlets_sf)
    inside_region <- sf::st_intersects(boxlet_cents, 
                                       region_sf, 
                                       sparse = FALSE)[, 1]
    boxlets_sf <- boxlets_sf[inside_region, ]
    
    # Recalculate areas after clipping/filtering
    boxlets_sf <- boxlets_sf |> 
      dplyr::mutate(
        area = as.numeric(sf::st_area(geometry))
      )
    
    boxlet_centroids <- sf::st_centroid(boxlets_sf)
    boxlet_coords <- sf::st_coordinates(boxlet_centroids)
    boxlets_sf$x <- boxlet_coords[, "X"]
    boxlets_sf$y <- boxlet_coords[, "Y"]
    
    # Estimate Boxlet Probabilities (p_j)
    pred_data <- sf::st_drop_geometry(boxlets_sf)
    pred_N <- predict(dsm1, 
                      newdata = pred_data, 
                      off.set = pred_data$area, 
                      type = "response")
    p_j <- pred_N / sum(pred_N, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # prevents NA
    p_j[is.na(p_j)] <- 0 
    p_j[p_j < 0] <- 0 
    
    # Safely compute Average Detection Probability (P_a)
    fitted_probs <- m1$ddf$fitted
    if (is.null(fitted_probs) || length(fitted_probs) == 0) {
      P_a <- summary(m1$ddf)$average.p
    } else {
      P_a <- length(fitted_probs) / sum(1 / fitted_probs)
    }
    
    # Simulate the Grid Shifts (b)
    shift_res <- design_spacing / 5 
    b_x <- seq(0, design_spacing - shift_res, by = shift_res)
    b_y <- seq(0, design_spacing - shift_res, by = shift_res)
    shifts <- expand.grid(x = b_x, y = b_y)
    B <- nrow(shifts) 
    
    A_b <- numeric(B)
    
    base_x <- seq(region_bbox["xmin"] - 
                    design_spacing, region_bbox["xmax"] + design_spacing, by = design_spacing)
    
    base_y <- seq(region_bbox["ymin"] - 
                    design_spacing, region_bbox["ymax"] + design_spacing, by = design_spacing)
    
    base_grid <- expand.grid(X = base_x, Y = base_y)
    
    # Calculate Q(b) for Each Shift
    for (i in 1:B) {
      shifted_grid <- base_grid
      shifted_grid$X <- shifted_grid$X + shifts$x[i]
      shifted_grid$Y <- shifted_grid$Y + shifts$y[i]
      
      shifted_points <- sf::st_as_sf(shifted_grid, coords = c("X", "Y"))
      shifted_buffers <- sf::st_buffer(shifted_points, dist = trunc_dist)
      shifted_survey_area <- sf::st_union(shifted_buffers)
      
      active_boxlets <- sf::st_intersects(boxlet_centroids, 
                                          shifted_survey_area, 
                                          sparse = FALSE)[, 1]
      
      Q_b <- sum(p_j[active_boxlets], na.rm = TRUE) * P_a
      A_b[i] <- N_hat * Q_b
    }
    
    # Apply the Multinomial Equation
    mean_A <- mean(A_b)
    var_n <- (1/B) * sum(A_b + (A_b^2) * (1 - 1/N_hat)) - mean_A^2
    var_n_boxlet <- max(0, var_n) 
    
    # Delta Method Integration for Boxlets
    k_points <- nrow(segdata)
    erhat_boxlet <- mean_A / k_points
    var_ER_boxlet <- var_n_boxlet / (k_points^2)
    
    delta_boxlet <- apply_delta(var_ER_boxlet, erhat_boxlet)
    
    # analytical_variances <- list(
    #   var_ER_boxlet = var_ER_boxlet, 
    #   se_N_boxlet = delta_boxlet$se_N,
    #   se_D_boxlet = delta_boxlet$se_D
    # )
    
    spatial_variances$var_ER_boxlet <- var_ER_boxlet
    spatial_variances$se_N_boxlet <- delta_boxlet$se_N
    spatial_variances$se_D_boxlet <- delta_boxlet$se_D
  }
    
    # Analytical Estimators (P2, P3)
  erhat_P2 <- mean(effort_data$count / effort_data$Effort)
  erhat_P3 <- sum(effort_data$count) / sum(effort_data$Effort)
  
  T_eff <- sum(effort_data$Effort)
  
  var.P2 <- (1 / (k * (k - 1))) * sum((effort_data$count / effort_data$Effort - erhat_P2)^2)
  var.P3 <- (1 / (T_eff * (k - 1))) * sum(effort_data$Effort * (effort_data$count / effort_data$Effort - erhat_P3)^2)
  
  delta_P2 <- apply_delta(var.P2, erhat_obs)
  delta_P3 <- apply_delta(var.P3, erhat_obs)
  
  analytical_variances <- list(
    var_ER_P2 = var.P2, se_N_P2 = delta_P2$se_N,
    var_ER_P3 = var.P3, se_N_P3 = delta_P3$se_N
  )
}
```

# Bootstraps

```{r, echo = FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Only runs if we have a valid density surface generated previously
if (exists("pred_grid") && !is.na(N_hat) && N_hat > 0) {
  
  # Prepare the probability vector using the dsm prediction grid
  density_surface_boot <- pred_grid |>
    mutate(N_expected = density * area)
  
  prob_vec <- density_surface_boot$N_expected / sum(density_surface_boot$N_expected, na.rm = TRUE)
  cell_dimensions <- sqrt(density_surface_boot$area)
  
  # Create a baseline dummy population to house the randomly generated animals
  dummy_density <- dsims::make.density(region = region, x.space = density_grid_spacing, constant = 1)
  dummy_pop_desc <- dsims::make.population.description(
    region = region,
    density = dummy_density,
    N = N_hat,
    fixed.N = TRUE
  )
  
  detect_boot <- make.detectability(key.function = "hn", scale.param = sigma_hat, truncation = trunc_dist)
  
  N_hat_results <- rep(NA, bootstrap_reps)
  
  # Iterative evaluation of spatial and process variance
  for (b in 1:bootstrap_reps) {
    
    # 1. Generate new animal placements in the discrete grid cells
    cell_counts <- as.vector(rmultinom(n = 1, size = N_hat, prob = prob_vec))
    
    base_x <- rep(density_surface_boot$x, cell_counts)
    base_y <- rep(density_surface_boot$y, cell_counts)
    base_sizes <- rep(cell_dimensions, cell_counts)
    
    # Randomly jitter uniformly inside their assigned boxlets
    animal_x <- base_x + runif(N_hat, min = -base_sizes/2, max = base_sizes/2)
    animal_y <- base_y + runif(N_hat, min = -base_sizes/2, max = base_sizes/2)
    
    # Initialize Population
    realized_population <- dsims::generate.population(
      object = dummy_pop_desc,
      detectability = detect_boot,
      region = region
    )
    
    # Overwrite the randomly initialized coordinates with the boxlet derived coordinates
    native_pop <- realized_population@population
    native_pop$x <- animal_x
    native_pop$y <- animal_y
    realized_population@population <- as.data.frame(native_pop)
    
    # 2. Re-throw the survey transects
    current_transects <- generate.transects(design)
    
    if (points_or_lines == "point") {
      survey_boot <- new("Survey.PT", 
                         population = realized_population, 
                         transect = current_transects, 
                         rad.truncation = trunc_dist)
    } else {
      survey_boot <- new("Survey.LT", 
                         population = realized_population, 
                         transect = current_transects, 
                         perp.truncation = trunc_dist)
    }
    
    # Run simulation
    survey_run <- suppressWarnings(run.survey(survey_boot, region = region))
    obs_data_boot <- survey_run@dist.data
    
    # 3. Fit base detection model to capture N_hat
    if (nrow(obs_data_boot) > 0) {
      tryCatch({
        capture.output(
          m2 <- ds(data = obs_data_boot, 
                   transect = points_or_lines, 
                   key = "hn", 
                   adjustment = NULL, 
                   truncation = trunc_dist, 
                   quiet = TRUE)
        )
        N_hat_results[b] <- as.numeric(m2$dht$individuals$N$Estimate)
      }, error = function(e) {
        N_hat_results[b] <- NA
      })
    }
  }
  
  bootstrap_results <- data.frame(replicate = seq_len(bootstrap_reps), 
                                  N_hat = N_hat_results)
  empirical_SE <- sd(bootstrap_results$N_hat, na.rm = TRUE)
}
```

## Bootstrap Summary

```{r}
boot_summary_table <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("True Model N_hat", 
             "Mean Bootstrap N_hat", 
             "Empirical Standard Error (SE)"),
  Value = c(N_hat, 
            mean(bootstrap_results$N_hat, na.rm = TRUE), 
            empirical_SE)
)

print(kable(boot_summary_table, digits = 2, caption = "Bootstrap Empirical Results Overview"))



p_hist <- ggplot(bootstrap_results, aes(x = N_hat)) +
  geom_histogram(fill = "steelblue", 
                 color = "black", 
                 bins = max(5, round(bootstrap_reps / 5))) +
  
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean(N_hat, na.rm = TRUE), color = "Mean Boot N_hat"), 
             linetype = "dashed", 
             linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = N_hat, color = "True Model N_hat"), 
             linetype = "solid", 
             linewidth = 1) +
  
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", 
                     values = c("Mean Boot N_hat" = "red", "True Model N_hat" = "darkgreen")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = paste("Distribution of N_hat over", bootstrap_reps, "Bootstraps"),
       x = "Estimated Abundance (N_hat)", y = "Frequency")

print(p_hist)
```

# Variance Comparison

```{r}
safe_extract <- function(lst, name) {
  if (!is.null(lst[[name]])) lst[[name]] else NA_real_
}

if (points_or_lines == "line") {
  R2_est       <- safe_extract(analytical_variances, "se_N_R2")
  R3_est       <- safe_extract(analytical_variances, "se_N_R3")
  S1_est       <- safe_extract(analytical_variances, "se_N_S1")
  S2_est       <- safe_extract(analytical_variances, "se_N_S2")
  O1_est       <- safe_extract(analytical_variances, "se_N_O1")
  O2_est       <- safe_extract(analytical_variances, "se_N_O2")
  P2_est       <- NA_real_
  P3_est       <- NA_real_
  striplet_est <- safe_extract(analytical_variances, "se_N_striplet")
  boxlet_est   <- NA_real_
} else {
  R2_est       <- NA_real_
  R3_est       <- NA_real_
  S1_est       <- NA_real_
  S2_est       <- NA_real_
  O1_est       <- NA_real_
  O2_est       <- NA_real_
  P2_est       <- safe_extract(analytical_variances, "se_N_P2")
  P3_est       <- safe_extract(analytical_variances, "se_N_P3")
  striplet_est <- NA_real_
  boxlet_est   <- safe_extract(spatial_variances, "se_N_boxlet")
}

empirical_SE <- if (exists("empirical_SE")) empirical_SE else NA_real_

# Create summary framework table
variance_comparison <- tibble(
  Estimator = c(
    "Bootstrap SE",
    "R2", 
    "R3", 
    "S1", 
    "S2", 
    "O1", 
    "O2", 
    "P2", 
    "P3", 
    "Striplet", 
    "Boxlet"
  ),
  `SE (N_hat)` = c(
    empirical_SE, R2_est, R3_est, S1_est, S2_est, O1_est, O2_est, 
    P2_est, P3_est, striplet_est, boxlet_est
  )
) |> 
  filter(!is.na(`SE (N_hat)`)) # Only display metrics active for the current transect method

kable(variance_comparison, digits = 3, caption = "Summary Comparison of Standard Errors")
```

```{r}
# er_var_type <- if_else(points_or_lines == "line", "R2", "P2")
# 
# m3 <- ds(
#   data = dist_data,
#   transect = points_or_lines,
#   key = "hn",
#   adjustment = NULL,
#   er_var = er_var_type,
#   truncation = trunc_dist,
#   quiet = TRUE
# )
# 
# m3$dht$individuals$N
```
